summary: Crystal‑clear recording captures an excellent 1993 show filled with tight new‑song performances and mellow selections.
review: All three reviewers rave about the audio, calling it clear, well‑balanced and a pleasure to listen to. They also agree the concert is one of the best of ’93, noting strong versions of the newer material and consistently tight playing throughout. The taper’s work is praised, making this a must‑have for fans of that era.

ai_rating.rationale: Three consistent 5‑star reviews highlight both superb sound quality and an outstanding performance, indicating the show and recording are near‑perfect.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the audio as crystal‑clear, well‑balanced and a pleasure to hear; no issues or flaws mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Mellow song choices dominate, with tight versions of both new ’93 material and classic cuts; reviewers consider it an excellent overview of the era.
